channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Young boy and mother critically injured in Perth car crash
item.description: A serious car crash occurred in Perth’s eastern suburbs late yesterday when a young boy and his mother were struck by a vehicle while crossing Belgravia Street in Cloverdale. The incident, which happe...

item.title: Successful Rescue of Three AAU Students by Police and Security Forces in Edo
item.description: Three female students of Ambrose Alli University (AAU) were rescued after a joint operation by police, Nigerian Army, Edo State Security Corps, and local hunters. The incident began on July 12 when ar...

item.title: Documentary Explores Life and Legacy of Poet Mary Oliver
item.description: The article discusses the documentary 'Mary Oliver: Saved by the Beauty of the World,' directed by Sasha Waters, which chronicles the poet's life from her troubled childhood to her rise as a celebrate...

item.title: ASX rises on US inflation data and banking sector earnings
item.description: Australian shares are poised for growth as US inflation data and strong bank earnings drive market optimism. US consumer prices fell in June for the first time in six years, easing pressure on the Fed...

item.title: West Bengal government撤回SC对最高法院取消77个穆斯林群体OBC地位裁决的上诉
item.description: The West Bengal government has withdrawn its appeal to the Supreme Court against a Calcutta High Court order that removed the Other Backward Classes (OBC) status for 77 Muslim communities. This decisi...

item.title: Guiding Children's Online Safety During School Holidays: Tips for Parents

item.title: Jane Campion's Tribute to Sam Neill: A Life of Grace and Artistry
item.description: Jane Campion, director of the acclaimed film *The Piano*, reflects on her profound relationship with actor Sam Neill, who passed away in 2026. The article details Neill's kindness, professionalism, an...

item.title: Donald Trump settles $8 million sex abuse claim with E Jean Carroll
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has paid writer E Jean Carroll approximately $8.06 million after a jury found him liable for sexually abusing and defaming her in a civil case. The payout, which includes t...

item.title: Single 6D Lotto Bettor Wins P1.249M Jackpot in PCSO Draw
item.description: A lone bettor successfully matched the exact sequence of numbers 9-9-3-2-5-4 in the PCSO's 6D Lotto draw on July 14, 2026, winning the P1.249 million jackpot prize. This marks the second major jackpot...

item.description: Spain secured their place in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final with a resounding 2-0 victory against France in a match held in Texas. The European champions showcased their tactical discipline and physica...

item.title: Indigenous Leaders Condemn Federal Clean Water Bill for Undermining Hard-Won Rights

item.title: MPs approve Hillsborough Law to prevent cover-ups and ensure accountability
item.description: The UK Parliament has approved the Hillsborough Law, a significant piece of legislation aimed at preventing state cover-ups and ensuring transparency in official investigations. Prime Minister Sir Kei...

item.title: Social Media Platforms Facilitate Access to Nudify Apps, Study Reveals

item.title: El Niño drought may not hit South Africa's food prices as hard as before due to better rainfall and grain stocks
item.description: The article discusses how the expected El Niño drought might impact South Africa's agriculture and food prices in 2027. While El Niño typically causes droughts in southern Africa, the 2026-27 summer c...
